national_security_en: The presence of armed groups in the territories of Djugu, Irumu, and Mambasa continues to limit humanitarian access in several affected or at-risk health zones.
The presence of armed groups in the territories of Djugu, Irumu, and Mambasa continues to limit humanitarian access in several affected or at-risk health zones.

The presence of armed groups in the territories of Djugu, Irumu, and Mambasa continues to limit humanitarian access in several affected or at-risk health zones. An SDB team was assaulted at Bunia cemetery, resulting in 5 response workers injured.
A security briefing was provided for 19 experts who arrived from Kinshasa.
Insecurity (CODECO, ADF) limiting access to high-risk zones. PERSPECTIVES: Strengthen security coordination and humanitarian access.
Security challenges include community resistance affecting response in Bunia; access limitations due to insecurity (CODECO, ADF) restricting operations in high-risk areas.
96 HCW cases including 19 deaths. Challenges: community resistance, insecurity (CODECO/ADF), staff strike in Bunia and Rwampara.
CHALLENGES: Strikes of health providers in Bunia and Rwampara. Insecurity and limited access (CODECO, ADF). PERSPECTIVES: Strengthening security coordination and humanitarian access.

No new major security incident reported in the consolidated presentation of 11 July 2026. Vigilance remains reinforced around PoE/PoC and treatment structures. Continued coordination with politico-administrative and security authorities to ensure response teams' access to high-risk areas.
No major security incidents. Teams secured at PoC/PoE and EDS. CHALLENGES: Insecurity with CODECO/ADF restricts access. PERSPECTIVES: Enhance security coordination and humanitarian access.
